title: Mindful Monday Meditation
description: Join us for a guided 30-minute meditation session to start your week with clarity and calm. Open to all experience levels.

title: Spring Step Challenge Kickoff
description: Kick off our 4-week team step challenge. Form teams of 4 and track your daily steps for prizes and bragging rights.

title: Healthy Meal Prep Workshop
description: Learn quick, budget-friendly meal prep techniques from a local nutritionist. Recipes and samples provided.

title: Team Trivia Social
description: Unwind with coworkers at our monthly trivia event. Snacks provided. Bring your best fun facts!

title: Career Development Lunch & Learn
description: A panel discussion on navigating career growth, featuring leaders from across the organization.

title: Yoga in the Park
description: Weather permitting, join us for an outdoor yoga session. All levels welcome. Mats provided.
